title: Development loadout — seat->backend routes, plugin servers, and the loadout extension mechanism
design_rules: claude_ask stays on ai-peer-mcp (no plugin equivalent)

agy_checkpoint stays on ai-peer-mcp BY DESIGN — the agy APPROVAL seat is local governance derived from the dossier, not a model call; ask_agy is an additional ADVISORY model seat and does not replace the approver
plugin location is env-overridable (TELOS_PLUGINS_DIR, default ~/claude-plugins); the registry names BACKENDS, not models (model ids are env/per-call; strengths live in build-gate/model-profiles.mjs)

loadout_extension.mechanism: seat-registry.mjs#withLoadout merges extra MCP plugin servers (docs research, search, anything MCP-shaped) reached via the router's namespaced form callTool('name:tool', args)
loadout_extension.declaration: programmatic servers, or a JSON file via TELOS_LOADOUT (default ~/.telos/loadout.json): { "servers": { name: { command, args|serverPath, framing } } }
loadout_extension.invariant: council tool routes ALWAYS win — a loadout server can never shadow a seat (registry servers spread last; tool routes untouched by withLoadout)

why: The loadout is part of the trust surface: which process answers a seat call determines whose provenance lands in a packet. Trust-relevant routes are pinned in-repo; convenience servers are declared, namespaced, and structurally unable to displace them.
change_rule: Re-routing a seat, adding a seat tool, or changing the shadow rule is a trust-surface change: Eye ruling -> Daedalus delta -> TELOS re-authorization; this contract must be updated in the same change or verify-contracts fails.

oracle.test: build-gate/scripts/test-seat-registry.mjs (trust routes local; plugin routes + argMap; TELOS_PLUGINS_DIR honored); breakout/scripts/test-seat-router.mjs (explicit council routes win; unrouted tools fail closed before any spawn)
oracle.contract_equals_code: docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs (rebuilds defaultSeatRegistry and deep-checks every route/framing against this contract; probes withLoadout attempting to shadow a seat server and requires the registry to win)
